violations.text: (Various food product) was observed held at (45-53 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

The following equipment was observed not in good repair: 1.grill drawer ambient temperature was 53DF. 2.Prep unit ambient temperature observed at 49DF. 3.faucet knob to 3 bay sink does not dispense hot water. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (food storage shelves ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
Cold water is lacking at hand sink in the kitchen. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
The (walls ) in the (basement ) area is in poor repair. Observed holes and insulation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025
Menu is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
Handwashing signage was lacking at the hand sink in the ladies restroom and kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (various food product) in the walk-in refrigerator and 2 Dr Reach in. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was (0) parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment to sanitize equipment in 3 bay sink until dishwasher is repaired and/or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

(Various food product) was observed held at (111) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC reheated to 165 or above. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

(Pasta, deli meats, and cheese ) was observed held at (45-47 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

(Various food product) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
Inspector observed packages of rodenticide on basement floor. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

The presence of (flies) is not controlled as evidenced by (live activity in kitchen and basement). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

The entrance doors to basement and kitchen is lacking screen doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
(Bags of potatoes ) were observed stored on the floor in the (basement ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of bar mat) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
Knives were observed being stored in between the knife holder and wall. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

Ice machine located in the (basement ) area was not in good repair. Observed inside panel detached from surface.The grill drawer observed in poor repair. Ambient temperature observed at 53DF.The faucet to the 3 bay sink observed in poor repair. Missing a faucet has aspray attached to sink.Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

Beverage tubing was observed in contact with ice used for drinks at the bar. Beverage tubing and cold plate beverage cooling devices must not be in contact with stored ice. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (stove hoods and food storage shelves ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
Cold water was lacking at the hansink in the kitchen and hot water was lacking at the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

The condensate from the (2 dr reach in, ice machine, and soda lines ) refrigeration unit is draining into a container, floor, and handsink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
The (wall) in the (basement) area is in poor repair.Observed holes and exposed insulation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

The area under basement stair have an accumulation of soil residue, clutter, trash, and/or other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
